intelligence.l1Text: Basic remote control, connected devices, and mobile visibility.

intelligence.l5Text: Local AI box, identity-aware permissions, and cross-system orchestration.
intelligence.l6Text: Robot-ready workflows, predictive maintenance, and semi-autonomous energy decisions.

about.title: About Us
about.p1: AinerWise is a B2B smart building and energy integration platform focused on delivering end-to-end solutions for hotels, villas, apartments, shops, and commercial buildings.
about.p2: We combine AI-assisted planning, a verified supply chain from China, local service partner networks, and lifecycle maintenance to deliver smart building projects that actually work in the real world.
about.approachText: Unlike traditional equipment marketplaces, AinerWise is not about selling cheap devices. We provide solution-ready devices with local integration and lifecycle support. Every project starts with understanding the site, the requirements, and the long-term goals.
about.tech1: KNX / Home Assistant / MQTT / CCTV / Access Control / HVAC automation
about.tech3: Remote maintenance and annual service plans
about.regionsText: Starting in Serbia, with planned expansion to Poland, New Zealand, and Australia. The same platform, localized for each region with local service partners, currency, and language support.

lead.title: Submit Project Requirement
lead.subtitle: Tell us about your project and get a preliminary assessment
lead.success: Your requirement has been submitted successfully! We will review and contact you soon.
lead.forgeSubtitle: Create the project by choosing one category, then let the AI intake collect missing smart-building details conversationally. No final quote is promised here.
lead.step1Label: What type of project are you planning?
lead.step1Desc: This is the only classic project-creation choice. After this, information is collected by AI-style questions.
lead.estimateWarning: AI budget output is estimate only. Final quotation requires manual review, meeting, site survey, supplier confirmation, and signed contract.

marketingIntegration.hubDesc: Manage approved creative briefs, external integration clients, and imported media review.
marketingIntegration.briefsDesc: Author, review, and publish deliverable specs for external media systems.
marketingIntegration.newBriefDesc: Draft copy and deliverables before human review.
marketingIntegration.clientsDesc: Issue credentials for external media systems (secret shown once).
marketingIntegration.newClientDesc: Create a client with scoped API access.
marketingIntegration.secretOnceHint: This secret is shown only once. Store it securely; it cannot be retrieved later.
marketingIntegration.secretSavedHint: After dismissing the secret banner it cannot be shown again.
marketingIntegration.importedDesc: Review externally submitted assets before scheduling (no in-app generation).
marketingIntegration.noImported: No imported assets for this filter.

lc.mpDesc: Temperature, humidity, door, probe, and tag points across projects.
lc.amcDesc: Annual Maintenance Contracts — the recurring-revenue core.
lc.swDesc: Device-level warranty terms suppliers provide to AinerWise.
lc.cwDesc: Coverage AinerWise provides to a customer on a project.
lc.invDesc: Spare and consumable stock, reservations, reorder levels, and expiry.
lc.mtDesc: Inspection, calibration, battery/probe replacement, and report tasks.
lc.calDesc: Completed calibrations with certificates, for audit traceability.
lc.pfDesc: Per-project cost ledger. Gross profit, margin, and 3/5/8-year LTV recompute automatically.
lc.pfrDesc: Platform / project-management fee rules by solution line and project size.
lc.ssDesc: Rate suppliers on quality, delivery, response, warranty cooperation, docs, price stability, and long-term fit.
lc.name: Name
lc.ctDesc: Recurring revenue, due dates, and project margin ranking.
lc.rqDesc: AMC renewals, calibration, probe/battery replacement, report renewal, and expansion.
lc.noRenewals: No renewal opportunities due. As AMC contracts, calibrations, and maintenance tasks approach their due dates, they appear here.
